warm_archive.description: 参考片最接近版本：暖色书房、资料片颗粒、低饱和商业/学习 B-roll。
warm_archive.subtitle: white Chinese bold with black stroke; smaller amber italic English below
warm_archive.chapter_text: large condensed yellow, slight shadow, no card container
warm_archive.camera: slow push or slow pan; hard cut every 3-7 seconds

cool_institutional.description: 偏办公室与研究机构：冷蓝灰、会议室、白板、屏幕和报告页。
cool_institutional.subtitle: same bilingual lockup, reduced yellow saturation
cool_institutional.chapter_text: large off-white/yellow word over dim B-roll
cool_institutional.camera: slow push with occasional lateral pan

high_contrast_warning.description: 用于反常识/风险主题：暗部更重，红色章节警示词更强。
high_contrast_warning.subtitle: white Chinese, amber English, occasional red keyword stamp
high_contrast_warning.camera: impact zoom on chapter words, otherwise slow pan
